summary: Created on master: hotfix instructions for the Windows subfolder LoRA/upscale separator bug + 1.0.0->1.0.1 bump + per-OS rebuild + release. Local-only master variant (path.sep, no remote branch).

Picked up on master. Applied 3-file local-only separator fix (routes/comfy.js path.sep emit, commandExecutor.js _resolveModelName at LoRA+upscale, MpiModelSettings.js _resolveToList dropdown seeding). node --check + eslint + release:check clean. Bumped 1.0.0->1.0.1 (appVersion+package+lock) + changelog (releaseNotes.js + 2026-06-14-v1.0.1.md). Build+Cloudflare release pending.

1.0.1 hotfix shipped. Fix verified live (subfolder LoRA generates clean; the .pth-in-LoRA-dropdown was a user config mistake — upscale folder mis-added to LoRA extras — not the fix). master 4a3c514 pushed; mpi-ci run 27512120983 built all 3 OS (ref=master, version=1.0.1, NO tag). 6 artifacts (3 full + 3 update) collected to D:\CubricStudio\Vision\Builds\v1.0.1\. Cloudflare/Patreon Pro upload handled separately in MadPony-Identity.
Archived completed card during board cleanup.
